title: SSC Tube is Hiring: Subject Matter Expert (Principal)

jsonLd.title: SSC Tube is Hiring: Subject Matter Expert (Principal)
jsonLd.description:
SSC Tube invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Subject Matter Expert at our Pimpri-Chinchwad location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About SSC Tube:
SSC Tube is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives
• Maintain classroom discipline and create a positive learning environment
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance
• Coordinate with academic counselors for student career guidance
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback
• Support students with special educational needs
• Maintain student records and prepare progress reports

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Special Education
• Proficiency in CBSE/ICSE Standards
• Proficiency in Pedagogy
• Proficiency in Bloom's Taxonomy
• Proficiency in LMS Platforms
• Proficiency in E-learning
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in IB Curriculum

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Annual performance appraisal
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Life and accident insurance
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Pimpri-Chinchwad, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with SSC Tube!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
